options.name: -color
options.description: Specifies the color value for the specified object.

options.name: -index
options.description: Specifies the index value for the specified object.

options.name: -original
options.description: Highlight the instance pin through original color.

options.name: -pattern
options.description: Specifies the pattern value for the specified object.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of SIGNAL/POWER pin. Allow user to define more than one pin's name.
